allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; goals=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Last goal number:'''', max\(g[''''number''''] for g in goals\)\); print\(''''Active/Queued:'''', [\(g[''''number''''], g[''''status''''], g[''''title'''']\) for g in goals if g[''''status''''] in [''''ACTIVE'''',''''QUEUED'''',''''WORKING'''']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''[{m[""author""]}]: {m[""body""]}''''\) for m in msgs[-10:]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; msgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''[{m[""author""]}]: {m[""body""]}''''\) for m in msgs[-5:]]")
